summary: The diff implements the majority of the requirements, including backend data models, frontend homepage, admin dashboard, seller management, chatbot widget, and visual theme. However, several specific details and sub-requirements are missing or incomplete based on the available diff evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: adminLogin function must return a session token (not just a Bool); ChatMessages CRUD must be fully exposed
missing_requirements.reason: The backend adminLogin function returns Bool instead of a session token as required. The visible portion shows async Bool return type. getChatMessages list retrieval is truncated and may not be fully implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Expose a list/getAll endpoint for Medicines and Sellers
missing_requirements.reason: The backend only shows getMedicine(id) and getSeller(id) individually. There is no visible getMedicines() or getAllSellers() bulk list endpoint. The frontend useGetAllSellers hook falls back to getActiveSellers(), suggesting a getAllSellers backend endpoint may be missing.

missing_requirements.requirement: Hero section must include a CTA button and full-width banner with G&S Medical logo; Founder profiles with bios, phones, and WhatsApp links; Contact section with all specified numbers
missing_requirements.reason: The HomePage file is among the omitted files and cannot be verified from the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Dashboard overview must show counts of total medicines, active sellers, AND pending sellers
missing_requirements.reason: AdminDashboard.tsx only shows active sellers count via useGetActiveSellers. There is no visible query for total medicines count or pending sellers count in the visible portion.

missing_requirements.requirement: Dedicated seller detail page (/sellers/:id) must display name, contact info, address, license number, and status badge
missing_requirements.reason: The SellerDetailPage file is among the omitted added files and cannot be verified from the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Chat messages must be stored and retrieved from the backend; chatbot must save messages via backend
missing_requirements.reason: The ChatWidget.tsx uses a local rule-based engine and local state only. There is no evidence of backend chat message storage being called from the widget.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity (ICP/DFINITY) authentication integration via InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states do not implement external authentication. The diff includes a full Internet Identity provider with AuthClient from @dfinity/auth-client, which is an external authentication mechanism not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Dark mode theme support with dark CSS variables
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention dark mode support. The index.css includes a full .dark theme variant with alternate color variables.
